The Treasury was so much larger than I had ever imagined (47 ft high!). While this is Petra's most photogenic facade, the entire lost city which is difficult to take pictures of was so fullsome and well preserved. For all of those who love to travel Petra is an absolute must. #ourearthsandwich

"All the world's a stage, And all the men and women merely players..." - Aspendos' Theatre is considered the best preserved Roman theatre of the ancient world. The acoustics of this 2400 year old structure are so phenomenal that even today it is used to host performances. #ourearthsandwich

As someone obsessed with food, I normally don't like to post food photos but this one I couldn't resist. Many long term travelers have a place where they get stuck because they've completely fallen in love and cannot leave. Ethan and I have loved so many places on this trip but never once felt the pull to stay in a place forever. That "stuck" feeling which has alluded us this whole trip has finally caught up with us. If it weren't for Ethan's Master's we would never leave this part of Turkey. We are seriously considering abandoning the rest of our itinerary until its time to go home. The Whirling Dervishes perform the Sema Ceremony where they whirl around and around in rememberance of the divine. #ourearthsandwich

Like all great passions there are always downsides and traveling is no different. In Santiago, Chile my dad's entire backpack got stolen and today in Madrid I got pickpocketed. And though the thief did not manage to take anything she did successfully open my purse and steal from me a sense of security I am used to as a traveller in Western Europe. It is a good reminder to be grateful for what I have. Here in gleaming contrast to the deprivation that creates pickpockets, Madrid's Cathedral of Consumerism: the Primark.

On our way to Sheki the road was dotted with vendors selling dried fruit wines, preserves and these round discs. Naturally we had to partake. The red pomegranate flavour one was too sour but the green kiwi one was great. It's what a fruit roll up from our childhood should have been instead of those purely sugar snacks we had!
